lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵਣੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਅੰਧੁ ਗੁਬਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh karam kamaavane haumai andh gubaar |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs do their deeds in the pitch black darkness of egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਸਭਿ ਭਰਮਦੇ ਨਿਤ ਜਗਿ ਤੋਟਾ ਸੈਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: vin naavai sabh bharamade nit jag tottaa saisaar |
lines.english: Without the Name of the Lord, everyone wanders around the world, losing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਜਾਗੈ ਸਹਜੇ ਸੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: sahaje jaagai sahaje sovai |
lines.english: He wakes in peace, and he sleeps in peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਵਣਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਬਦੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: guramukh amrit peevanaa naanak sabad veechaar |1|
lines.english: The Gurmukhs drink in the Ambrosial Nectar, O Nanak, contemplating the Word of the Shabad. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਉਸਤਤਿ ਹੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh anadin usatat hovai |
lines.english: The Gurmukh praises the Lord night and day.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਨੀਦ ਨ ਸੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: antar chintaa need na sovai |
lines.english: He is filled with anxiety, and he cannot even sleep.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨੀ ਜਾਗਹਿ ਸਵਹਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: giaanee jaageh saveh subhaae |
lines.english: The spiritually wise wake and sleep in peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਭਰਮੈ ਸਹਸਾ ਹੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh bharamai sahasaa hovai |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh remains deluded by his doubts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਇਕੁ ਧਿਆਵਹਿ ਇਕੁ ਇਕੋ ਹਰਿ ਸਤਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: har ik dhiaaveh ik iko har satiaa |
lines.english: They meditate on the One Lord; the One and Only Lord is True.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤਿਆ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam ratiaa bal jaau |2|
lines.english: Nanak is a sacrifice to those who are imbued with the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵਹਿ ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਰਤਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: se har naam dhiaaveh jo har ratiaa |
lines.english: They alone meditate on the Lord's Name, who are imbued with the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਇਕੋ ਵਰਤੈ ਇਕੁ ਇਕੋ ਉਤਪਤਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: har iko varatai ik iko utapatiaa |
lines.english: The One Lord is pervading everywhere; the One Lord created the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵਹਿ ਤਿਨ ਡਰੁ ਸਟਿ ਘਤਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jo har naam dhiaaveh tin ddar satt ghatiaa |
lines.english: Those who meditate on the Lord's Name, cast out their fears.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਨ ਆਇਓ ਜਿਤੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਸੋਝੀ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: antar giaan na aaeo jit kichh sojhee paae |
lines.english: Spiritual wisdom, which would bring understanding, does not enter into his mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਦੇਵੈ ਆਪਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿਆ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: guramatee devai aap guramukh har japiaa |9|
lines.english: The Lord Himself blesses them with Guru's Instruction; the Gurmukh meditates on the Lord. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਡਿਠਾ ਕਿਆ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਅੰਧਾ ਅੰਧੁ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: vin dditthaa kiaa saalaaheeai andhaa andh kamaae |
lines.english: Without seeing, how can he praise the Lord? The blind act in blindness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਬਦੁ ਪਛਾਣੀਐ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak sabad pachhaaneeai naam vasai man aae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, when one realizes the Word of the Shabad, then the Naam comes to abide in the mind. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਾ ਬਾਣੀ ਇਕੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਇਕੋ ਸਬਦੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: eikaa baanee ik gur iko sabad veechaar |
lines.english: There is One Bani; there is One Guru; there is one Shabad to contemplate.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਉਦਾ ਹਟੁ ਸਚੁ ਰਤਨੀ ਭਰੇ ਭੰਡਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa saudaa hatt sach ratanee bhare bhanddaar |
lines.english: True is the merchandise, and true is the shop; the warehouses are overflowing with jewels.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਪਾਈਅਨਿ ਜੇ ਦੇਵੈ ਦੇਵਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur kirapaa te paaeean je devai devanahaar |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, they are obtained, if the Great Giver gives them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਉਦਾ ਲਾਭੁ ਸਦਾ ਖਟਿਆ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa saudaa laabh sadaa khattiaa naam apaar |
lines.english: Dealing in this true merchandise, one earns the profit of the incomparable Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੁ ਸਲਾਹੀਐ ਧੰਨੁ ਸਵਾਰਣਹਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak sach salaaheeai dhan savaaranahaar |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, praise the True Lord; blessed is the Creator, the Embellisher. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਖੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪ੍ਰਗਟਿਆ ਕਰਮਿ ਪੀਆਵਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: vikh vich amrit pragattiaa karam peeaavanahaar |
lines.english: In the midst of poison, the Ambrosial Nectar is revealed; by His Mercy, one drinks it in.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਕੋ ਬੋਲੈ ਸਚੁ ਕੂੜਾ ਜਲਿ ਜਾਵਈ ॥
lines.translit: je ko bolai sach koorraa jal jaavee |
lines.english: If someone speaks the Truth, falsehood is burnt away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਕੂੜੁ ਵਰਤੈ ਸਚੁ ਨ ਭਾਵਈ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa andar koorr varatai sach na bhaavee |
lines.english: Those who are permeated by falsehood, do not love the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਹੋਇ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲੁ ਸੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵਈ ॥
lines.translit: jis har hoe kripaal so naam dhiaavee |
lines.english: When the Lord grants His Grace, then one meditates on the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜਿਆਰੀ ਰਜੈ ਕੂੜਿ ਜਿਉ ਵਿਸਟਾ ਕਾਗੁ ਖਾਵਈ ॥
lines.translit: koorriaaree rajai koorr jiau visattaa kaag khaavee |
lines.english: The false are satisfied by falsehood, like the crows who eat manure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਰਾਧਿ ਕੂੜੁ ਪਾਪੁ ਲਹਿ ਜਾਵਈ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: har guramukh naam araadh koorr paap leh jaavee |10|
lines.english: As Gurmukh, worship the Lord's Name in adoration; fraud and sin shall disappear. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਖਾ ਚਉਚਕਿਆ ਚਉਵਾਇਆ ਏਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਇਕਤੁ ਘਰਿ ਆਣਿ ॥
lines.translit: sekhaa chauchakiaa chauvaaeaa ehu man ikat ghar aan |
lines.english: O Shaykh, you wander in the four directions, blown by the four winds; bring your mind back to the home of the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹੜ ਤੇਹੜ ਛਡਿ ਤੂ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਪਛਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: eeharr teharr chhadd too gur kaa sabad pachhaan |
lines.english: Renounce your petty arguments, and realize the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਅਗੈ ਢਹਿ ਪਉ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਜਾਣੈ ਜਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: satigur agai dteh pau sabh kichh jaanai jaan |
lines.english: Bow in humble respect before the True Guru; He is the Knower who knows everything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਨਸਾ ਜਲਾਇ ਤੂ ਹੋਇ ਰਹੁ ਮਿਹਮਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa manasaa jalaae too hoe rahu mihamaan |
lines.english: Burn away your hopes and desires, and live like a guest in this world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਭੀ ਚਲਹਿ ਤਾ ਦਰਗਹ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਮਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kai bhaanai bhee chaleh taa daragah paaveh maan |
lines.english: If you walk in harmony with the True Guru's Will, then you shall be honored in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਤੋਟਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har gun tott na aavee keemat kehan na jaae |
lines.english: There is no end to the Lord's Glorious Praises; His worth cannot be described.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਚੇਤਨੀ ਤਿਨ ਧਿਗੁ ਪੈਨਣੁ ਧਿਗੁ ਖਾਣੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak ji naam na chetanee tin dhig painan dhig khaan |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who do not contemplate the Naam, the Name of the Lord - cursed are their clothes, and cursed is their food. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਰਵਹਿ ਗੁਣ ਮਹਿ ਰਹੈ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh har gun raveh gun meh rahai samaae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukhs chant the Glorious Praises of the Lord; they are absorbed in His Glorious Virtues. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਚੋਲੀ ਦੇਹ ਸਵਾਰੀ ਕਢਿ ਪੈਧੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: har cholee deh savaaree kadt paidhee bhagat kar |
lines.english: The Lord has adorned the coat of the body; He has embroidered it with devotional worship.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪਾਟੁ ਲਗਾ ਅਧਿਕਾਈ ਬਹੁ ਬਹੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਭਾਤਿ ਕਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: har paatt lagaa adhikaaee bahu bahu bidh bhaat kar |
lines.english: The Lord has woven His silk into it, in so many ways and fashions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਕਹੈ ਵਿਚਾਰਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਤਿ ਹਰਿ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: jan naanak kahai vichaaraa guramukh har sat har |11|
lines.english: Poor servant Nanak speaks: the Gurmukhs know the Lord, the Lord is True. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਬੂਝੈ ਏਹੁ ਬਿਬੇਕੁ ਜਿਸੁ ਬੁਝਾਏ ਆਪਿ ਹਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: so boojhai ehu bibek jis bujhaae aap har |
lines.english: He alone understands these deliberations, whom the Lord Himself inspires to understand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਈ ਬੂਝੈ ਬੂਝਣਹਾਰਾ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਿਬੇਕੁ ਕਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: koee boojhai boojhanahaaraa antar bibek kar |
lines.english: How rare is that man of understanding, who understands, and deliberates within.
